hero.title: Art, Ritual, Story & Interactive Worlds
hero.body: Some work begins with a single brushstroke. Some begins with a line of poetry, a strange character, a sound, a light, or a ridiculous idea that refuses to leave. Across mediums, I'm interested in the same thing: turning attention into an experience people can feel.

painting.title: Painting
painting.subtitle: Enso, brushwork, and daily mindful art practice.
painting.body: My painting practice centers on the enso: a circular brushstroke used as a meditation on presence, imperfection, movement, and release. Each mark records a moment of breath, pressure, speed, hesitation, and surrender.

images.alt: Close-up enso painting with brush and ink tray
Outdoor enso painting ritual setup with cushions, brushes, and painted circles
Participatory enso wall with circular brush paintings

poetry.title: Poetry & Lyrics
poetry.subtitle: Haiku, lyrical fragments, and short-form meditations.
poetry.body: My writing practice includes haiku, poems, lyrics, and compressed text works — small forms that hold emotion, humor, grief, wonder, and attention.

collectedHaiku.title: Collected Haiku
collectedHaiku.body: Select haiku are available as digital collectibles through OpenSea.

story.title: Story & Worldbuilding
story.subtitle: Original mythology, character-driven fiction, picture books, and animated worlds.

projects.title: Shaman Santa
projects.body: Shaman Santa is an original story world in development — beginning as a written narrative and expanding toward a picture book and animated film. The project explores myth, generosity, transformation, absurdity, and spirit through a new holiday archetype.

digitalArt.title: Digital Art & AR
digitalArt.subtitle: 3D characters, augmented reality triggers, and playful digital creatures.

projects.title: Con Pollo
projects.body: Con Pollo is a 3D digital bird character designed in Blender and built for augmented reality interaction. The experience uses scanned chicken imagery as a trigger, allowing the bird to emerge, fly, and animate from physical image markers.

music.title: Music & Sound Production
music.subtitle: Lyrics, production, audio programming, and interactive live systems.
music.body: My sound work includes lyrics, music production, audio-reactive systems, and custom performance tools. For the Stinky Blinkers installation at SOAK, I built an interactive live audio system connecting LED behavior to sound through Python, OSC, Max for Live, and Ableton.
music.highlight: The installation translated physical light controls into musical changes — triggering instruments, shaping effects, and turning the sculpture into a playable sound environment.

image.alt: Interactive wizard face installation with illuminated eyes inside a dome

installation.title: Interactive Installation
installation.body: A participatory installation blending LED sculpture, wizard mythology, tactile controls, music, and live audio programming. Built for SOAK with Possitopia, the piece invited participants into a ritual-play environment where light, sound, character, and interaction became one shared experience.

image.alt: Outdoor Possitopia dome installation with enso paintings displayed nearby

specs.label: Environment
specs.value: Dome installation, wizard face, participatory art space

specs.label: Interaction
specs.value: Physical controls mapped to sound and light behavior

specs.label: Software
specs.value: Python serial listener and OSC message routing

specs.label: Audio
specs.value: Max for Live devices, Ableton instruments, effects, clips

specs.label: Experience
specs.value: Live sound-reactive sculpture and participatory ritual

closing.title: Creative Practice
closing.body: Whether I'm painting an enso, writing a haiku, building a digital bird, producing sound, or wiring a sculpture into Ableton, the work is chasing the same thing: presence, participation, and a little bit of wonder.
